context.description: A German nonfiction book page presents a reflective argument that the body is a towering, dark presence that people prefer to ignore and diminish. The passage frames this tendency as detrimental and prepares a broader discussion of its consequences.
normalization_notes: Translated visible German prose into English summary and retrieval text.
No chapter or section heading was visible; classified as theoretical discussion based on the reflective passage.

rows.paragraph_text: Our body is a giant. A dark giant standing behind us that we are all too eager to ignore and belittle, to our detriment.

content.free_text: book_page book_content theoretical_discussion Bewusstseinsreisen - Version 2; page 18; German nonfiction reflection on the body as a dark giant, ignored and diminished to the reader's detriment; topics: body, consciousness, metaphor.
